prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类（含理科）最低位次约 11277→11899→10655→17301→20664，2024 年起因新高考专业组划分（501 组再选不限）位次明显后移，近两年累计后移约 3363 名；2025 年基准约 20664 名；本省物理类计划 2021 年 120 人、2022 年 121 人、2023 年 117 人、2024 年 116 人、2025 年 122 人；2026 年计划 119 人，较 2025 年小幅缩招约 2.5%，缩招使竞争略有缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名 2026 年约第 56 名，近年排名稳定在 54–61 区间，属中上水平理工类院校；该校在 2021–2026 年声誉评价中未见明显正面或负面舆情事件，抖音热度未进入全国前 100 名，整体报考关注度平稳；该校以地质学、地质资源与地质工程为传统优势，相关专业社会热度一般。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等热门专业持续高热，但地大优势学科属传统工科，热度平稳；本省 2026 年物理类考生约 26.79 万人，较 2025 年 26.64 万人微增约 0.6%，竞争略有加剧；省控线 2025 年本科批 429 分，较 2024 年 448 分下降，反映试卷难度或考生结构变化；该校位于湖北武汉，在江西省招生占比约 2.7%–3.3%，属中等水平跨省招生，无明显地域偏好信号。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次近两年因专业组划分大幅后移、2026 年计划小幅缩招约 2.5% 使竞争略有缓解、本省物理类考生微增约 0.6% 使竞争略加剧，在 2025 年基准 20664 名基础上预计位次小幅前移；预测最低位次约 20389 名，区间 19889–20889 名。

- 自动化/人工智能。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 11277→11899→10655→17301→20664. Since 2024, due to the new Gaokao major group division (Group 501 with no re-selection restrictions), the ranking has significantly shifted backward, with a cumulative backward shift of about 3363 places in the last two years. The 2025 baseline is approximately 20664. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 120 in 2021, 121 in 2022, 117 in 2023, 116 in 2024, and 122 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 119, a slight reduction of about 2.5% compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Ranking, it is approximately 56th, with recent rankings stable in the 54–61 range, placing it as a mid-to-upper level science and engineering institution. From 2021 to 2026, there were no significant positive or negative public opinion events in its reputation evaluation. Its Douyin popularity did not enter the national top 100, indicating stable overall application attention. The university's traditional strengths are geology, geological resources, and geological engineering, with related majors having average social popularity.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly sought after, but the university's advantageous disciplines are traditional engineering fields with stable popularity. In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in the province is approximately 267,900, a slight increase of about 0.6% from 266,400 in 2025, slightly intensifying competition. The provincial control line for the undergraduate batch in 2025 was 429 points, down from 448 points in 2024, reflecting changes in exam difficulty or examinee structure. The university is located in Wuhan, Hubei, and its enrollment proportion in Jiangxi Province is about 2.7%–3.3%, indicating a moderate level of cross-provincial enrollment with no significant regional preference signals.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward shift in historical rankings over the past two years due to major group division, the slight reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan by about 2.5% slightly easing competition, and the slight increase in provincial Physics Category examinees by about 0.6% slightly intensifying competition, based on the 2025 baseline of 20664, the ranking is expected to move slightly forward. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 20389, with a range of 19889–20889.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, etc.)
- Electronic Information (Electronic Information Engineering, Communication Engineering)
- Automation/Artificial Intelligence.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Geology (Elite Class/National Top Talent Plan)
- Mathematics/Statistics
- Electrical/Mechanical
- Geographical Science/Surveying and Mapping.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Geology (Resources and Energy/Geological Engineering)
- Materials/Applied Chemistry/Environmental Science and Engineering
- Business Administration/English/Broadcasting and Television.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 19889–20889, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, appropriately aim for Tier 1 majors, and use Tier 3 majors as a safe backup. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<19889), you can focus on impacting popular Tier 1 majors such as Computer Science and Electronic Information. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>20889), you should mainly consider Tier 3 majors to secure admission to the university.
